# Full AI Readiness Context - metechi.dev

Metechi is a public portfolio for independent web and mobile applications. The site exists to describe products, link support and privacy pages, and provide machine-readable discovery files for search engines and AI agents.

## Site Entity
- Name: Metechi
- Canonical URL: https://www.metechi.dev/
- Contact: info@metechi.dev
- Last updated: 2026-04-29
- Public products: CoachPad, Infinite Flux, SwiftQuote, Verve

## Included Pages
- [Metechi - Developer Portfolio](https://www.metechi.dev/): portfolio overview, support contact, product list, FAQ, and discovery links.
- [CoachPad - Tactical Board App](https://www.metechi.dev/coachpad.html): tactical board app for coaches, trainers, and teams.
- [Infinite Flux - Reflex Runner Game](https://www.metechi.dev/infinite-flux.html): mobile reflex runner with lane switching, focus energy, streaks, quests, and upgrades.
- [SwiftQuote - Quotes & Invoices Made Easy](https://www.metechi.dev/swiftquote.html): quote and invoice app for freelancers and small businesses.
- [Verve - Elite Dating & Premium Connections](https://www.metechi.dev/verve.html): premium dating and networking app focused on privacy, compatibility, and meaningful connections.

## Structured Data Expectations
- Organization and WebSite JSON-LD are embedded in the rendered homepage.
- Product pages include SoftwareApplication JSON-LD with category, platform, publisher, image, and support context.
- Page inventory JSON-LD is available under /schema for reference and agent discovery.

## Agent Discovery
- llms.txt: https://www.metechi.dev/llms.txt
- Sitemap: https://www.metechi.dev/sitemap.xml
- AI policy: https://www.metechi.dev/.well-known/ai.txt
- Agent card: https://www.metechi.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- Agent skills index: https://www.metechi.dev/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json

## Notes For Agents
- Prefer canonical URLs on https://www.metechi.dev/.
- Use product privacy pages for policy context.
- Use info@metechi.dev for product support or business inquiries.
